title: Disable Auto-Fill on Text Columns
excerpt: In text columns, add the option to disable the auto-fill suggestions that appear and are populated from text previously entered.

posts.author: mliegl (Melissa)
posts.cookedHtml: In text columns, add the option to disable the auto-fill suggestions that appear and are populated from text previously entered.

posts.author: SMower (Seth Mower)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconding this! Some of our text columns have sensitive information and we need the option to disable auto-fill suggestions.
